input.location: Chapelle Saint-Louis, 14 Rue de la Paix, Strasbourg, 67000, France
input.description: A documentary about disappearing minority languages in Europe's border regions, with a focus on Alsatian
input.what_to_film: Interior filming of a Sunday service conducted partly in Alsatian dialect, and a 60-minute interview with a parishioner afterwards in the chapel
input.insurance: Full European production insurance (Responsabilité Civile Professionnelle) — attestation available on request
input.specific_concerns: We understand the sensitivity of filming during a religious service and are prepared to discuss placement restrictions, silent equipment operation, and any areas that must remain off-camera
input.previous_correspondence: Introductory email sent 15 July 2026; this letter follows up on that initial contact
